orchestrator-tool-loop.rule: The orchestrator intercepts request_human_input BEFORE dispatching to any MCP client. The check must appear in the tool-dispatch loop, before any client.callTool() call.

task-status-enum.rule: tasksTable.status enum and taskStatusSchema z.enum must be kept in sync — both must gain 'awaiting_input' in their respective states.

tool-error-throw.rule: All operational errors use throw new ToolError('CODE', message). task_resume uses VALIDATION_ERROR for bad token and TASK_NOT_RESUMABLE for process-restart case.
